question: What is the trip screen shown?
content: The trip screen is a multi-function display page for engine-operation hours, fuel-consumption, and trip data. The shown screen has a menu, scrollbar, and Reset button; its visible four menu entries are water temperature, average fuel economy, trip distance, and fuel used.<PIC> The menu shows four items at a time; scroll with the scrollbar. Touch and hold an item to reset it, or tap Reset to reset all resettable items; asterisked items cannot be reset.
ret: "The trip screen is a multi-function display page for engine-operation hours, fuel-consumption, and trip data. The shown screen has a menu, scrollbar, and Reset button; its visible four menu entries are water temperature, average fuel economy, trip distance, and fuel used.<PIC> The menu shows four items at a time; scroll with the scrollbar. Touch and hold an item to reset it, or tap Reset to reset all resettable items; asterisked items cannot be reset.",["Manual09_69"]
notes: Exact Trip screen section found in Yamaha 210FSH 2021 manual. Manual09_69 directly shows the labeled trip screen with menu, scrollbar, Reset button, and the visible four menu entries.
